SELECT exp(1) AS exp_one, exp(2) AS exp_two FROM exp_test WHERE value < 2;
SELECT t1.value, exp(t1.value) FROM exp_test t1 JOIN exp_test t2 ON t1.value < t2.value;
SELECT DISTINCT exp(value) FROM exp_test WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM exp_test WHERE value > 0);
SELECT exp(subquery.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM exp_test WHERE value < 0) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE exp_related (id INT, ref_value FLOAT);
SELECT e.value, exp(e.value), r.ref_value FROM exp_test e JOIN exp_related r ON e.value = r.ref_value;
SELECT SUM(exp(value)) FROM exp_test WHERE value BETWEEN -1 AND 1;
SELECT exp(CASE WHEN value > 0 THEN value ELSE 0 END) FROM exp_test;
SELECT e.value, (exp(e.value) + r.ref_value) AS combined_result FROM exp_test e LEFT JOIN exp_related r ON e.value = -r.ref_value;
